dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: You give flowers to our friends yet?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Good. I know they appreciate them.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: So you just got them for yourself? What's up with you?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Oh! I almost forgot. Here, I found this in front of your door.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: ...I'm sorry, I was trying to not bring it up, but I still can't believe Penelope's gone.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: I tried warning her about going out that night. She didn't listen, but I still can't help but feel that it's my fault.

choices.text: Irene, you can't blame yourself for what happened.
If you were so worried, why didn't you go?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: I know, I know. It's just hard...but thanks, Echo.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: I ask myself that every day, Echo. If you hate being here with me so much, why'd you even come?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Sorry. It's just that...I would do anything to change what happened.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Oh man, it's getting late. I've gotta head back. I told Stevie I'd fix the gravestones that are tilting, would you be a doll and do it for me?.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Also, Stevie said he has something to give you, so go see him after you're done here.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Thanks for coming, Echo. See you tomorrow.
